attacking_style: Multiple-wave breakaway specialist who attacks early and repeatedly, willing to go in first breaks then regroup and attempt subsequent moves to exhaust peloton.
team_tactics: Appears to operate with freedom to join opportunistic breaks; uses double-break tactic to stress opposition domestiques and create control gaps.
terrain_preference: Long, attritional courses where diesel engine qualities shine; capable on climbs (survived Mammalstein) but excels in sustained breakaway efforts over varied terrain.
vulnerability: Single race data insufficient to identify clear vulnerabilities, though multiple breakaway attempts suggest difficulty finishing moves alone.
key_patterns: Participates in multiple breakaway waves within same race to exploit peloton fatigue.
Shows diesel engine endurance, able to regroup after being dropped and rejoin efforts.
Uses early breakaway participation as tactical weapon rather than all-or-nothing commitment.
form_trajectory: positive: demonstrated exceptional endurance surviving two breaks and regrouping after being dropped, suggesting strong diesel capacity
